biography: Una Brandon-Jones was born on April 24, 1916 in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, UK. She was an actress, known for Withnail and I (1987), Chaplin (1992) and All Creatures Great & Small (1978). She was married to John Gold. She died on December 22, 2010 in London, England, UK.
name: Una Brandon-Jones
